name: Myanmar
headline: Myanmar FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical — May 14 conduct accumulation: three discrete airstrike events documented in 24h window plus IIMM-anniversary accountability signal. Bilin Township (Mon State): 2 killed including a child, 6 injured in air and ground attacks on Wintarpan village (civilian vehicle + village strike). Mindat (Chin State): 11 airstrikes within 2 days, 4 killed including detainees in custody. Continuing Tanintharyi, Mon, Sagaing pattern. IIMM (Independent Investigative Mechanism for Myanmar) statement on one-year anniversary of Depayin school airstrike (20+ students killed) warns children face ongoing serious risks — new accountability-dimension signal. Min Aung Hlaing '100-day peace plan' (announced April 21) directly contradicted by ongoing airstrike conduct — ACC gap event. No score change from 0.0 floor; conduct documentation updated.

AWR.rationale: Floor sustained. State-level detection of civilian harm absent; junta-controlled territory does not include independent monitoring. International monitoring (IIMM, UN SR) operating despite obstruction.

EMP.rationale: Floor sustained. No state-level empathic response to documented civilian deaths including children. Detainee deaths in Mindat custody represent a custodial-care violation in addition to the airstrike harm.

ACT.rationale: Floor sustained. AC1 responsiveness: state response remains military escalation in Mon, Chin, Sagaing, Tanintharyi simultaneously. '100-day peace plan' (April 21) directly contradicted by May 6-14 cluster of strikes.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. EQ2 distributional awareness: targeting falls disproportionately on ethnic-minority regions (Mon, Chin, Karen, Sagaing). Continued pattern of ethnic-region targeting documented in HRW 2026 World Report.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. B3 scope clarity: airstrikes on civilian vehicles, villages, and detainees in custody establish scope-of-violence well beyond any military-objective framing.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. AB2 correction willingness: '100-day peace plan' is a stated-intent signal directly contradicted by enacted-conduct evidence (May 6-14 strike cluster). Stated-intent-vs-enacted-action gap is itself a documented ACC-failure signal. IIMM anniversary statement is external accountability signal.

SYS.rationale: Floor sustained. S1 causal reasoning: continued aerial-strike pattern without de-escalation is a systems-level commitment to military-strike-doctrine. S2 long-term impact: 9,400+ cumulative airstrikes since coup, 3,800+ civilian deaths from airstrikes alone.

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. I1 consistency under pressure: '100-day peace plan' rhetoric vs. May 6-14 strike cluster is a canonical bad-faith-rhetoric signal. I4 values alignment: zero alignment between stated peace agenda and enacted military conduct.

evidence.summary: Bilin Township (Mon State) May 14: 2 killed including a child, 6 injured in air and ground attacks on Wintarpan village; civilian vehicle struck.
Mindat (Chin State): 11 airstrikes within 2 days, 4 killed including detainees in custody.
DVB: 15+ civilians killed in junta airstrikes in the week prior — sustained pattern.
IIMM statement on one-year anniversary of Depayin school airstrike (20+ students killed) warns children face ongoing serious risks. New accountability-dimension signal.

keyEvidence: May 14 2026: Bilin Township airstrike + ground attack — 2 killed including child, 6 injured; Wintarpan village; civilian vehicle strike.
May 13 2026: Mindat (Chin State) — 11 airstrikes in 2 days, 4 killed including detainees in custody.
Carry-over: May 12 Oe Htein Kwin / Depayin school airstrike death toll rose to 25 (May 13 cycle documentation).
IIMM anniversary statement on Depayin school airstrike (one year on) — new external accountability signal.
April 21 Min Aung Hlaing '100-day peace plan' directly contradicted by May 6-14 strike cluster — stated-intent-vs-enacted-action gap.
rationale: Floor sustained. May 14 conduct documentation: three discrete airstrike-event categories (Bilin civilian vehicle/village; Mindat detainee deaths; weekly airstrike baseline) plus IIMM anniversary accountability signal. The April 21 '100-day peace plan' is structurally important — its direct contradiction by the May 6-14 strike cluster establishes a canonical bad-faith-rhetoric signal that runs parallel to Russia's bad-faith ceasefire-format compound (cross-cluster pattern). No score change from 0.0 floor.
watches: IIMM operational expansion under continued junta obstruction
ASEAN Five-Point Consensus status (continuing no documented behavioral change)
Malaysia aviation-fuel embargo call (Fortify Rights, carry-over)
carryForward: May 12 Depayin school airstrike (25 dead) — carry-over from May 13
Fortify Rights + Malaysia aviation-fuel embargo call — carry-over
9,400+ cumulative airstrikes since coup; 3,800+ civilian deaths
newConductCategoryNote: The April 21 '100-day peace plan' announcement contradicted by May 6-14 strike cluster establishes a cross-cluster methodological pattern with Russia's bad-faith ceasefire-format compound. Both are 'stated-de-escalation-rhetoric-with-enacted-escalation-conduct' compounds. Recommend methodology team consider unified category framing.

math_check.validator_check: Floor maintained. May 14 conduct does not affect composite arithmetic.
